description.value:
A medical-grade metered inhaler retrofitted for off-label substances. The dose-calibration ring lets a careful user keep below the body's panic threshold — the chemistry hits with the same edge but slightly less of the wallop.

Buffered intake. Provides a +2 bonus to Constitution saving throws against addiction from inhaled substances administered through this inhaler.

effects.name: Calibrated Inhaler — Save Modifier
effects.description: Grants a +2 bonus to Constitution saving throws against addiction to inhaled substances administered through the Calibrated Inhaler.
